etymology.description: phonetic 冎(冎) (guǒ, "skull") + semantic 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") -> evokes a container, leading to meaning "pot"
etymology.interpretation: The character 呙(呙) combines the phonetic component 冎(冎) (guǒ, "skull") with the semantic element 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") to represent an object that is open and hollow, fitting the meaning of a "pot." This blend of sounds and meanings suggests a container-like object.
